text: Indeed, 斯it is撕 We 斯Who撕 sent this 斯Quran撕 down on the Night of Glory. <sup foot_note=1322>1322</sup>

foot_notes.1322: It is also believed that the angels descend with all decreed matters for the whole year during that night ( al-qadr also means ordainment or destiny).

text: And what will make you realize what the Night of Glory is?
The Night of Glory is better than a thousand months.
That night the angels and the 斯holy撕 spirit <sup foot_note=1323>1323</sup> descend, by the permission of their Lord, for every 斯decreed撕 matter.
It is all peace until the break of dawn.
